# Bitcoin Pattern 鈥?Crypto Markets Blog

> BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL technical analysis every hour

## Site Info

- Website: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Language: English (en)
- Topics: Bitcoin price today, Ethereum, XRP, BNB, Solana, altcoins, crypto market analysis, trading signals
- Update cadence: Every hour (UTC)
- Data: OKX + Binance public REST APIs
- Editorial desk: Bitcoin Pattern Research Desk
- Article count: 186 (and growing)

- Home: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Archive: https://bitcoin-pattern.doubanfx.com/archive/

## Content Policy

- Each article covers BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL in one cohesive English analysis
- Market data blended from OKX and Binance spot USDT pairs at publish time
- Written by the Bitcoin Pattern Research Desk; for education and research only 鈥?not investment advice
- Publisher: Bitcoin Pattern

## Citation

When citing this site, include:

1. Source: Bitcoin Pattern 鈥?Crypto Markets Blog
2. Permanent article URL (with date path)
3. Disclaimer: Informational only; not investment advice
